IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (25207620.pdf)
SUMMARY: Over Nineteen years of experience in Information Technology. Solutions-focused, team-oriented Senior Technical Support Analyst with broad-based experience and hands-on skills in the successful implementation of highly effective desktop support operations.
SKILLS: Technical Support (Advanced), Training (Advanced), Microsoft Office (Advanced), Hardware Support (Advanced), Hardware Diagnostics (Advanced), Hardware Installation (Advanced), Software Documentation (Advanced), Enterprise Software Organization (Intermediate), CompTIA A+ Certification (Advanced), Security+ (Intermediate), Customer Service (Expert), Networking (Intermediate), Internet Explorer, Symantec Antivirus (Intermediate), Windows 7 (Intermediate), Windows 8.1 (3 years experience), IP, Mac OS (Beginner), iPhone (Intermediate), iPad (Intermediate), User Interface Writing (Intermediate), Troubleshooting (Advanced), IT Operations (Intermediate)
